title: Get 25% off on Integrate Plus for Slack

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

Hope everyone’s looking forward to a wonderful festive season!

At Upscale, we couldn’t be more excited for it. As part of our end of year celebrations, we’re now offering 25% off of all subscription plans for Integrate Plus for Slack.

Haven’t yet had a chance to try the app? Give it a try now, and you’ll still be able to take up the offer as we have it running till 31st December 2024.

Should you have any questions at all, feel free to get in touch with me.

Ankur Sharma
Product Marketing Manager, Integrate Plus for Slack
